stemHtml: An airplane cruises with a Mach number slightly higher than MCRIT, what are the benefits?

options.a: A higher speed for a small increase in C<sub>D</sub>.
options.b: There are no benefits and it is highly dangerous to exceed M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
options.c: No shockwaves are present upon passing M<sub>CRIT</sub>, they don't develop until Mach 2.
options.d: The lowest safety speed in relation to shock stall.
